insights: 4.8/5 Google rating with 331 reviews. 24/7 access — one of very few gyms in north Jaipur offering round-the-clock operation. Spans 3 floors, making it the largest gym by floor area in the Jhotwara zone. Serves the manufacturing and industrial worker population of Jhotwara with flexible operating hours. Members report joining for 8+ months with consistent satisfaction. Competes directly with Assured Fit Gym and Prime Fitness Club in Sanjay Nagar.
